page_metadata.biotools__summary: A computational method to study intercellular communication. It uses human or mouse gene expression data of interacting cells in order to predict ligand-receptor interactions that might drive gene expression changes in cells of interest.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A computational method to study intercellular communication. It uses human or mouse gene expression data of interacting cells in order to predict ligand-receptor interactions that might drive gene expression changes in cells of interest.
